Slides Editor
Main Navigation GuideFeaturesTutorialsGitHub

Appearance

Slides EditorBuild beautiful presentations — self-hosted

WYSIWYG slides powered by reveal.js. Run it yourself — no account, no cloud, no tracking.

Get Started
View on GitHub

WYSIWYG Editing

Click and type directly on slides with TipTap rich text. Headings, bold/italic, tables, code blocks, and more — no markup required.

LaTeX & TikZ

Full LaTeX math and TikZ diagrams with live split-pane preview. Inline KaTeX in text elements too.

Export Anywhere

Export as standalone HTML, offline HTML, PDF, or PowerPoint. Share via link or push directly to GitHub.

Self-Hosted

Docker, desktop app (Electron), or run from source. Your data stays on your machine — no sign-up required.

Themes & Templates

11 reveal.js themes, 6 design presets, custom reusable templates, and per-slide backgrounds.

Cloud Sync

Sync to Proton Drive or any rclone-supported provider — S3, Google Drive, Dropbox, and more.
